metadata.description: Compact, source-grounded catalog of Apple Core AI models, artifacts, capabilities, modalities, runtime metadata, device support and sources.
metadata.name: Core AI Catalog

models.name: Qwen3.5-0.8B
models.notes: Top-1 exact vs Hugging Face reference according to upstream.

models.name: Qwen3.5-2B
models.notes: Top-1 exact vs Hugging Face reference according to upstream.

models.name: Qwen3.6-35B-A3B
models.notes: Mac-only MoE; custom gather_qmm Metal kernel.

models.name: GLM-4.7-Flash
models.notes: MoE + MLA; custom gather_qmm Metal kernel.

models.name: Gemma 4 E2B
models.notes: Text decoder; upstream reports 8/8 exact vs HF.

models.name: Unlimited-OCR
models.notes: Document OCR to markdown; tables to HTML; formulas to LaTeX.

models.name: Qwen2.5-Omni-3B Audio
models.notes: Audio understanding; describes sounds, not literal transcript.

models.name: EmbeddingGemma 300M
models.notes: Text embeddings for on-device RAG / semantic search.

models.name: Whisper large-v3-turbo
models.notes: Bundle includes tokenizer and mel filterbank.

models.name: MiniCPM5-1B
models.notes: Hybrid Think/No-Think reasoning; 128K context; int8 lossless (24/24 exact vs HF).

models.name: FastContext-1.0-4B
models.notes: Repository-exploration agent (Microsoft); Qwen3-4B arch; AOT h18p; ANE unsupported.

models.name: BitCPM-8B
models.notes: First 1.58-bit ternary LLM; custom 2-bit packed-GEMM Metal kernel; ~2.1 GB resident on iPhone.

models.name: Holo2-4B
models.notes: GUI-grounding / computer-use VLM (H Company); Qwen3-VL-4B backbone; screenshot → click coordinates.

models.name: ColModernVBERT
models.notes: Visual document retriever; ColBERT/MaxSim late-interaction; ModernBERT + SigLIP2.

models.name: Qwen3-ASR-1.7B
models.notes: Zoo's first ASR; AuT encoder + Qwen3 decoder; 52 languages.

models.name: Parakeet-TDT-0.6B
models.notes: First transducer/TDT (RNN-T); NVIDIA FastConformer + LSTM predictor; 25 EU languages; iPhone 47.9× realtime.

models.name: VoxCPM2 2B
models.notes: 2B successor at 48 kHz; MiniCPM4 28L LM + LocDiT-12L flow-matching + 48 kHz AudioVAE.

models.name: YOLOX-S
models.notes: First single-stage anchor-free detector (YOLO family); CSPDarknet + PAFPN; per-class NMS; 208 FPS on M4 Max GPU.

models.name: TripoSplat
models.notes: Single image → 3D Gaussian splats; DINOv3 ViT-H + 20-step flow-matching DiT; .ply/.splat → RealityKit / MetalSplatter; VAST; Mac-only.

models.name: LTX-Video 2B distilled
models.notes: First video model; T5-XXL + 8-step flow-matching DiT + causal video VAE; 512×768×49f ~14s Mac GPU; Lightricks; Mac-only.

models.name: Qwen3 1.7B
models.notes: Fills the missing 1.7B rung in the dense Qwen3 Core AI line. GPU-only — ANE export omitted (loads but fails on iOS 27).

models.name: CLIP ViT-B/32
models.notes: Official recipe CLIP export (models/clip/export.py); fp16 static; text padded to 77 tokens for free-text queries. Image+text → cosine similarity.

models.name: LLaDA-8B dLLM
models.notes: First diffusion LM (dLLM) on Core AI. Masked bidirectional text generation, no KV cache. int4 viable (not a cliff). ~38 tok/s at threshold 1.0.

models.name: BitVLA
models.notes: First VLA / robotics model on Core AI. 1.58-bit ternary VLA: BitNet LLM + BitSigLIP vision → 7-DoF robot action. Generalized ternary kernel (arbitrary K/N).

models.name: Stable Audio Open Small
models.notes: First generative audio model. Latent diffusion: T5 encoder + DiT (8-step rectified-flow) + Oobleck VAE. ~11s 44.1 kHz stereo in ~0.4s on M4 Max (≈30× real-time).

models.name: Whisper large-v3-turbo (CarstenL)
models.notes: Independent conversion with split encoder/decoder .aimodel bundles. 99 languages.

models.name: Whisper tiny.en (Intiser)
models.notes: English-only Whisper tiny variant. Minimal footprint ASR.

models.name: Gemma 4 12B IT Multimodal (warshanks)
models.notes: First multimodal Gemma 4 conversion: text+image+audio input via encoder-free architecture. Custom conversion recipe extending coreai-models. INT4 block-32 weight-only decoder. Multi-function bundle (main, prefill_multimodal, embed_vision, embed_audio).

models.name: Gemma 4 12B IT Assistant (MTP draft)
models.notes: Multi-token-prediction draft model for speculative decoding with Gemma 4 12B. Cross-attends main model KV cache (layers 46/47) zero-copy. ~3ms/step on M4 Max vs ~21ms for the 12B. Companion to warshanks/gemma-4-12B-it-coreai.

models.name: VibeVoice 0.5B
models.notes: Streaming TTS with 0.5B Qwen2 backbone. 10.2x RTF on M4 Max. Multi-bundle pipeline: LM + diffusion sampler + acoustic decoder/connector. Microsoft VibeVoice original weights.

models.name: VibeVoice 1.5B
models.notes: Multi-speaker TTS with 1.5B Qwen2 backbone. INT8 LM. 4.99x RTF on M4 Max.

models.name: VibeVoice 7B
models.notes: High-quality multi-speaker TTS with 7B Qwen2 backbone. INT8/4 LM. 2.37x RTF on M4 Max.

models.name: VibeVoice ASR
models.notes: On-device transcription, Qwen2-7B. INT8/4 LM. 11.1x RTF on M4 Max. Microsoft VibeVoice ASR original weights.

models.name: Nemotron 3.5 ASR Streaming 0.6B
models.notes: NVIDIA FastConformer + RNN-T streaming ASR. Cache-aware 320ms encoder mode. AOT artifacts for iOS (A19 h18p) + macOS (M3-M5). Companion Swift package mweinbach/NemotronCoreAI. Multiple quantization variants (int8, lut6, lut8). 174 files.

models.name: Z-Image Turbo
models.notes: Tongyi-MAI Z-Image Turbo text-to-image. GPU (fast-512) and ANE (ane-1024, hoisted-adaLN) bundles at 512 and 1024 resolution. For CoreAIStudio on macOS/iOS/iPadOS/visionOS.

models.name: Real-ESRGAN x4v3
models.notes: 4x super-resolution (SRVGGNetCompact). fp16, 256 tile size. For CoreAIStudio.

models.name: EfficientSAM3-TinyViT
models.notes: Lightweight promptable segmentation. Hosted by Lenitas app distribution. 392MB total with tokenizer. SHA-256 verified.

models.name: RWKV-7 Goose 1.5B
models.notes: First pure-recurrent / linear-attention LLM on Core AI. No attention, no KV cache — O(1) per-token decode with constant memory and unbounded context. WKV7 delta-rule matrix-state time-mix + sqrelu channel-mix. int8 weight-only quant (FFN only; recurrence projections kept fp16).

models.name: V-JEPA 2 ViT-L (SSv2)
models.notes: First video world-model on Core AI. JEPA architecture (joint-embedding predictive) from Meta — learns video representations by predicting masked spatiotemporal patches. fp16, AOT h18p specialized. Trained on Something-Something v2 (action recognition). ViT-L backbone.

models.name: Ornith 1.0 9B
models.notes: First agentic-coding model in the ecosystem. Qwen3.5 hybrid decoder (32 layers, 3:1 GatedDeltaNet/attention interleave) trained by DeepReinforce to jointly solve coding tasks and construct orchestration scaffolds. int8hu ship recipe delivers 48.3 tok/s decode on M4 Max. int4lin variant reaches 58.9 tok/s (+22%), 7.5 GB. 24/24 exact match vs fp32 oracle on both quantizations. Dense MLP(12288), hidden 4096, untied 248320-vocab lm_head. Max context 8192.
